productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Back Strap Black Casual Shoe
description: The party season's here and it's time to ramp up your wardrobe with this classy boot from catwalk. Crafted with soft and durable material in a stylish design, this boot is designed to look great with dresses and skirts. Upper Supple synthetic leather upper with perforations for enhanced breathability Has a toe cap and an overlay along the lacing system at the back and collar for enhanced shoe structure and durability Inner lining with soft fabric for abrasion-free all-day comfort Tongue at the heel to double up as a heel guard and provide abrasion-free, snug comfort Outsole TPR outsole with grooves on the forefoot and decoupled heel for absolute grip Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
